title: hedypnois rhagadioloides subsp. monspeliensis
intro: Hedypnois rhagadioloides subsp. monspeliensis, also known as the French or Spanish heliotrope, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Hedypnois rhagadioloides subsp. monspeliensis include its use as a diuretic and expectorant, which helps to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote urinary tract health. Hedypnois rhagadioloides subsp. monspeliensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a natural and effective way to harness its medicinal properties.
